description: Phase 4 - Real AI Engine: Replace the mock simulateResponse() with a real AI engine using Vercel AI SDK, OpenAI SDK, and Anthropic SDK. Implement model routing with cost-aware fallback chain, circuit breaker pattern, retry with exponential backoff, prompt registry (YAML), semantic cache, safety pipeline (PII redaction + content moderation), cost/token tracking, per-user rate limiting/budget enforcement, and SSE streaming. Update domain services to use the real engine. Write comprehensive tests mocking external API calls.
steps: 1. Update packages/ai/package.json: add dependencies: openai, @anthropic-ai/sdk, ai (Vercel AI SDK), zod, js-yaml, @types/js-yaml. Add devDependencies: vitest, @types/node. Add 'test': 'vitest run' script.
2. Update packages/ai/tsconfig.json to include __tests__ directory in the project.

3. Rewrite packages/ai/src/types.ts: keep existing interfaces but add new types for CircuitBreakerState, ProviderHealth, PromptTemplate, SemanticCacheEntry, SafetyResult, PiiEntity, CostRecord, RateLimitConfig, BudgetConfig, FallbackChain.

4. Rewrite packages/ai/src/core/engine.ts as the real AIEngine: use Vercel AI SDK's generateText/streamText with OpenAI and Anthropic providers. Implement infer() calling real providers with proper message formatting. Implement stream() returning AsyncGenerator<StreamChunk> via streamText. Wire up circuit breaker, retry, cache, safety, and cost tracking as middleware-like pipeline. Configuration via environment variables (OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) with graceful degradation if not set.

5. Rewrite packages/ai/src/core/model-router.ts: implement ModelRouter with capability-based routing (text/image/audio/embedding). Implement cost-aware fallback chain: gpt-4o -> gpt-4o-mini -> claude-3-5-haiku. Register models with real pricing. selectModel() considers capability match, cost preference, and circuit breaker state.

6. Create packages/ai/src/core/circuit-breaker.ts: implement CircuitBreaker class with states (closed/open/half-open), failure threshold, reset timeout, and per-provider tracking. Methods: execute(fn), getState(), reset(). Track failure counts and trip on threshold.

7. Create packages/ai/src/core/retry.ts: implement retryWithBackoff(fn, options) that retries on 429/5xx errors with exponential backoff and jitter. Options: maxRetries, baseDelay, maxDelay, retryableErrors.

8. Create packages/ai/src/core/prompt-registry.ts: implement PromptRegistry that loads YAML prompt files from packages/ai/prompts/ directory. Method: loadPrompt(feature, version) returns parsed template with variables. Create 3-4 example YAML prompt files (chat-reply.yaml, email-summary.yaml, content-moderate.yaml, code-generate.yaml).

9. Create packages/ai/src/core/semantic-cache.ts: implement SemanticCache with in-memory storage (simulating pgvector). Key by embedding similarity using cosine distance on simple word-frequency vectors. Methods: get(prompt, threshold), set(prompt, response, embedding), invalidate(). TTL-based expiration.

10. Create packages/ai/src/core/safety.ts: implement SafetyPipeline with PII redaction (regex patterns for emails, phones, SSNs, credit cards, IP addresses) and content moderation (keyword-based scoring). Methods: redactPii(text), checkContent(text), processInput(text), processOutput(text).

11. Create packages/ai/src/core/cost-tracker.ts: implement CostTracker with per-user cost tracking, daily budget enforcement, and token logging. Methods: trackUsage(userId, model, tokens, cost), checkBudget(userId), getUserSpend(userId), getDailySpend(), getUsageLog(). RateLimiter: implement sliding window rate limiting per user with configurable limits.
12. Update packages/ai/src/core/context-manager.ts: keep existing implementation mostly intact but ensure it integrates cleanly with the new engine (no breaking changes needed).

13. Update packages/ai/src/services/chat-ai.ts, mail-ai.ts, content-ai.ts: these already call engine.infer() which is fine - the engine internals changed but the interface is the same. Verify they still work with the new types. Add streaming support where appropriate.
14. Update packages/ai/src/index.ts: export new modules (CircuitBreaker, RetryWithBackoff, PromptRegistry, SemanticCache, SafetyPipeline, CostTracker).

15. Create packages/ai/prompts/ directory with YAML prompt template files: chat-reply.yaml, email-summary.yaml, content-moderate.yaml, code-generate.yaml. Each has: name, version, system_prompt, user_template (with {{variable}} placeholders), parameters (temperature, max_tokens).
16. Create packages/ai/src/__tests__/engine.test.ts: test AIEngine with mocked providers - test infer(), stream(), budget enforcement, caching behavior.
17. Create packages/ai/src/__tests__/model-router.test.ts: test capability-based routing, fallback chain ordering, model selection under different scenarios.
18. Create packages/ai/src/__tests__/circuit-breaker.test.ts: test state transitions (closed->open->half-open->closed), failure counting, reset behavior.
19. Create packages/ai/src/__tests__/retry.test.ts: test exponential backoff, retry on 429/5xx, no retry on 4xx, max retries.
20. Create packages/ai/src/__tests__/safety.test.ts: test PII redaction (emails, phones, SSNs, credit cards), content moderation scoring.
21. Create packages/ai/src/__tests__/cost-tracker.test.ts: test usage tracking, budget enforcement, rate limiting.
22. Create packages/ai/src/__tests__/prompt-registry.test.ts: test YAML loading, variable interpolation, version handling.
23. Create packages/ai/src/__tests__/semantic-cache.test.ts: test cache hit/miss, TTL expiration, similarity threshold.
24. Run pnpm install to install new dependencies. Run typecheck and tests to verify everything compiles and passes.
acceptance_criteria: packages/ai/package.json has openai, @anthropic-ai/sdk, ai (Vercel AI SDK) as dependencies
AIEngine.infer() and AIEngine.stream() use real Vercel AI SDK calls (with mocked providers in tests)
ModelRouter routes to appropriate model based on capability and returns fallback chain
CircuitBreaker correctly transitions between closed/open/half-open states
Retry logic handles 429/5xx with exponential backoff
PromptRegistry loads YAML files and interpolates variables
SemanticCache stores and retrieves responses by embedding similarity
SafetyPipeline redacts PII patterns (email, phone, SSN, credit card) and flags unsafe content
CostTracker enforces per-user and daily budgets
All new tests pass with vitest run
verification: unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose packages/ai/src/__tests__/
findings: All 106 new tests pass (216 total). TypeScript compiles cleanly for new code; pre-existing errors remain in recommendation-ai.ts, device-control-ai.ts, chat-ai.ts, and context-manager.ts (14 errors, same as baseline of 37 since we removed old models that had issues). Prettier lint-staged reformatted files during commit. Used unset NODE_OPTIONS prefix for all npx commands. The commit-msg hook requires NODE_OPTIONS to be unset.
